name: Shalimar Bagh Mughal Garden
description: The largest and most magnificent Mughal garden in Kashmir, characterized by terraced lawns, cascading fountains, and exquisite chinar trees.
history: Built in 1619 by Mughal Emperor Jahangir for his beloved wife Nur Jahan. The name 'Shalimar' translates to 'Abode of Love'.
famousFor: Mughal architecture, terraced gardens, autumn chinar leaves.
bestTime: April to October (Autumn colors in October)
